title: Amazon Neptune DB Instance
description: Represents an Amazon Neptune DB instance, which is a compute node within a Neptune DB cluster that processes graph queries and manages the connection to the shared cluster storage.

DBInstanceIdentifier.description: The user-supplied unique identifier for the DB instance.

DBInstanceArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) for the DB instance.

DBInstanceClass.description: The compute and memory capacity of the DB instance (e.g., db.r5.large, db.r6g.xlarge, db.serverless).

Engine.description: The name of the database engine.

EngineVersion.description: The version of the Neptune database engine.

DBInstanceStatus.description: The current state of the DB instance.

Endpoint.description: The connection endpoint for the DB instance.

Address.description: The DNS address of the DB instance.

Port.description: The port that the DB instance listens on.

HostedZoneId.description: The ID of the hosted zone for the endpoint.

DBClusterIdentifier.description: The identifier of the DB cluster that this instance belongs to.

AvailabilityZone.description: The name of the Availability Zone where the DB instance is located.

DBSubnetGroup.description: The DB subnet group associated with the instance.

PreferredMaintenanceWindow.description: The weekly time range during which system maintenance can occur (UTC).

AutoMinorVersionUpgrade.description: Whether minor engine version upgrades are applied automatically.

PubliclyAccessible.description: Whether the DB instance is publicly accessible.

PromotionTier.description: The order in which a read replica is promoted to the primary instance during a failover.

StorageEncrypted.description: Whether the DB instance storage is encrypted.

KmsKeyId.description: The AWS KMS key identifier for the encrypted instance.

DbiResourceId.description: The AWS Region-unique, immutable identifier for the DB instance.

CACertificateIdentifier.description: The identifier of the CA certificate for this DB instance.

CopyTagsToSnapshot.description: Whether tags are copied to snapshots of the DB instance.

InstanceCreateTime.description: The date and time when the DB instance was created.

PendingModifiedValues.description: Changes to the DB instance that are pending application.
